Changement climatique

Thomas Delcey

2022-06-27

1 Temperature

1.1 Global

df <- read.csv(here(data_path, "global_warming.csv"), sep = ",")

gg <- df %>%
    ggplot() + geom_line(aes(x = Year, y = Lowess.5.), linewidth = 1,
    color = "blue") + ylab("Degr? Celsius") + xlab("Ann?e") +
    theme_light()

ggsave(here(figure_path, "global_warming_short.png"), gg, device = "png",
    width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 300)

plot(gg)

1.2 sea and land

df <- read.csv(here(data_path, "global_warming_sea_land.csv"),
    sep = ",")

gg <- df %>%
    ggplot() + geom_line(aes(x = Year, y = Lowess.5., color = "Terres"),
    linewidth = 1) + geom_line(aes(x = Year, y = Lowess.5..1,
    color = "Mers"), linewidth = 1) + scale_color_manual(name = "",
    values = c(Terres = "darkred", Mers = "darkblue")) + ylab("Degr? Celsius") +
    xlab("Ann?e") + theme_light()

ggsave(here(figure_path, "global_warming_sea_land.png"), gg,
    device = "png", width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 300)

plot(gg)

2 CO2

2.1 global

df <- read_xlsx(here(data_path, "contribution_CO2.xlsx"), col_names = TRUE)

df2 <- df %>%
    select(c(`Changement d'affectation des sols`, `Ressources fossiles et industries`,
        Année)) %>%
    rename(`Affectation des sols` = `Changement d'affectation des sols`) %>%
    pivot_longer(!Année)

gg <- df2 %>%
    ggplot() + geom_area(aes(x = Année, y = as.numeric(value),
    fill = name), position = position_stack(reverse = T)) + scale_fill_manual(name = "",
    values = c(`Affectation des sols` = "darkgreen", `Ressources fossiles et industries` = "darkorange")) +
    guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE)) + ylab("milliards de tonnes de CO2 par an") +
    theme_light()

ggsave(here(figure_path, "CO2_area.png"), gg, device = "png",
    width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 300)

plot(gg)

2.2 fossil

df <- read_xlsx(here(data_path, "contribution_CO2.xlsx"), col_names = TRUE)

df3 <- df %>%
    select(-c(`Ressources fossiles et industries`, Total)) %>%
    rename(Varia = Autres) %>%
    pivot_longer(!Année)

gg <- df3 %>%
    ggplot() + geom_area(aes(x = Année, y = as.numeric(value),
    fill = name), position = position_stack(reverse = T)) + scale_fill_manual(name = "",
    values = c(`Changement d'affectation des sols` = "darkgreen",
        Gaz = "yellow", `P?trole` = "darkblue", Charbon = "darkgrey",
        `Production du ciment` = "pink", Varia = "darkorange")) +
    guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE)) + ylab("milliards de tonnes de CO2 par an") +
    theme_light()

ggsave(here(figure_path, "CO2_area_details.png"), gg, device = "png",
    width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 300)

plot(gg)

2.3 by country

df <- read_xlsx(here(data_path, "repartition_gaz.xlsx"), col_names = TRUE)


df <- df %>%
    rename(fossiles = "Ressources fossiles et industrie", sols = "Changement d'affecation des sols") %>%
    select(-c(`Pourcentage de la région`)) %>%
    melt(id.vars = 0:1) %>%
    group_by(Régions) %>%
    mutate(lab_ypos = cumsum(as.numeric(value)) - 0.5 * as.numeric(value)) %>%
    mutate(value = ifelse(value == 0, "", value))

gg <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Régions, y = as.numeric(value))) +
    geom_col(aes(fill = variable), width = 0.9, position = position_stack(reverse = T)) +
    scale_fill_manual(name = "", values = c("darkorange", "darkgreen")) +
    geom_text(aes(y = lab_ypos, label = value, group = "Emission"),
        color = "white") + theme_light() + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90,
    hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5)) + ylab(expression(paste("Emission de ",
    CO[2], " cumul?e")))


ggsave(here(figure_path, "repartition_gaz_cumule.png"), gg, device = "png",
    width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 300)

plot(gg)

2.4 2019 per capita

df <- read_xlsx(here(data_path, "repartition_gaz_2019.xlsx"),
    col_names = TRUE)

df2 <- df %>%
    rename(fossiles = "CO2-Ressources fossiles et industries (tonnes CO2-eq per capita)",
        sols = "CO2-Changement d'affectation des sols (tonnes CO2-eq per capita)") %>%
    select(-c(`Cumulative population in millions`, `Autres gaz à effet de serre (tonnes CO2-eq per capita)`,
        Total)) %>%
    melt(id.vars = 0:1) %>%
    group_by(Region)

gg <- df2 %>%
    group_by(Region) %>%
    mutate(total = sum(as.numeric(value))) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = Region, y = as.numeric(value))) + geom_col(aes(fill = variable),
    width = 0.9, position = position_stack(reverse = T)) + scale_fill_manual(name = "",
    values = c("darkorange", "darkgreen")) + geom_text(aes(y = total +
    0.7, label = total, group = "Emission"), color = "black") +
    theme_light() + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90,
    hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5)) + ylab(expression(paste("Emission de ",
    CO[2], " en 2019 / habitant")))

ggsave(here(figure_path, "repartition_gaz_2019.png"), gg, device = "png",
    width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

plot(gg)

2.5 Carbon footprint

df <- read_xlsx(here(data_path, "emprunte_carbonne.xlsx"), col_names = TRUE)

df2 <- df %>%
    rename(emission = "...1") %>%
    # select(-c(`Pourcentage de la r?gion`)) %>%
melt(id.vars = 0:1) %>%
    mutate(value = as.numeric(value)) %>%
    group_by(variable) %>%
    mutate(difference = value - head(value, n = 1)) %>%
    filter(emission == "Empreinte")

gg <- df2 %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = variable, y = as.numeric(difference))) + geom_col(fill = "midnightblue") +
    ylab(expression(paste("Tonnes de ", CO[2], " en 2019 / habitant"))) +
    xlab("R?gion") + theme_light() + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90,
    hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5))

ggsave(here(figure_path, "emprunte_carbonne_2019.png"), gg, device = "png",
    width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

plot(gg)

2.6 word emission by activities

df <- read_xlsx(here(data_path, "emission_secteur_direct.xlsx"),
    col_names = TRUE)

gg <- df %>%
    mutate(`%` = as.character(`%`)) %>%
    mutate(ymax = cumsum(`%`), ymin = c(0, head(ymax, n = -1)),
        labelPosition = (ymax + ymin)/2, label = paste0(Secteur,
            "\n Valeur: ", `%`, "%")) %>%
    ggplot(aes(ymax = ymax, ymin = ymin, xmax = 4, xmin = 3,
        fill = Secteur)) + geom_rect() + geom_label(aes(x = 3.5,
    y = labelPosition, label = label), size = 5) + coord_polar(theta = "y") +
    xlim(c(2, 4)) + scale_fill_viridis_d() + theme_void() + theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave(here(figure_path, "emission_secteur_direct.png"), gg,
    device = "png", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

plot(gg)

#US Federal discount rate

df <- read_xlsx(here(data_path, "discount_rate_OMB.xlsx"), col_names = TRUE)

gg <- df %>%
    mutate(Année = str_extract(`Calendar Year`, "[0-9]{4}")) %>%
    rename(`3 ans` = `3-Year`, `5 ans` = `5-Year`, `7 ans` = `7-Year`,
        `10 ans` = `10-Year`, `30 ans` = `30-Year`) %>%
    select(c("7 ans", Année)) %>%
    melt(id = "Année") %>%
    ggplot() + geom_line(aes(x = as.numeric(Année), y = as.numeric(value),
    group = variable), linewidth = 2, color = "midnightblue") +
    ylab("Taux d'actualisation choisi ? 7 ans") + xlab("Année") +
    theme_light() + theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12))

ggsave(here(figure_path, "discount_rate_OMB.png"), gg, device = "png",
    width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

plot(gg)
